Traits.Name: Amphibious
Traits.Content: The dragon can breathe air and water.

Traits.Name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
Traits.Content: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

Actions.Name: Acid Breath
Actions.Content: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 18, each creature in a 60-foot-long, 5-foot-wide Line. Failure: 54 (12d8) Acid damage. Success: Half damage.

Actions.Name: Multiattack
Actions.Content: The dragon makes three Rend attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting to cast Acid Arrow (level 3 version).

Actions.Name: Rend
Actions.Content: Melee Attack Roll: +11, reach 10 ft. 13 (2d6 + 6) Slashing damage plus 4 (1d8) Acid damage.

Actions.Name: Spellcasting
Actions.Content:
The dragon casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17, +9 to hit with spell attacks):

- **At Will:** Detect Magic, Fear, Acid Arrow
- **1/Day Each:** Speak with Dead, Vitriolic Sphere

LegendaryActions.Name: Cloud of Insects
LegendaryActions.Content: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 17, one creature the dragon can see within 120 feet. Failure: 22 (4d10) Poison damage, and the target has Disadvantage on saving throws to maintain Concentration until the end of its next turn. Failure or Success: The dragon can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

LegendaryActions.Name: Frightful Presence
LegendaryActions.Content: The dragon uses Spellcasting to cast Fear. The dragon can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

LegendaryActions.Name: Pounce
LegendaryActions.Content: The dragon can move up to half its Speed, and it makes one Rend attack.
